title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a E-commerce Executive in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
